title: Update set_position_fix_time for upper bound/skew and future timestamp rejection
description: Modify set_position_fix_time in lichen/subsys/lichen/meshtastic/adapter.c to detect skew against current time, add upper bound check, reject future timestamps (> current + skew) with clear error (new flag or return code). Update struct, parse function, callers, tests in meshtastic_adapter test. Add Kconfig for skew tolerance. Follow codereview after each chunk.
close_reason: Completed upper bound and skew (20yr from epoch floor as current time proxy) in set_position_fix_time:ad apter.c:559; added rejected_future flag to struct:adapter.h:79; updated Kconfig; fixed all 6+ test assertions in meshtastic_adapter test; 3 codereview passes completed with all P4 fixed and closed; tests pass
